description: Homepage hero headline and copy A/B/C test
hypothesis: Direct, plain-language headline (v3) will outperform abstract 'future of tech' messaging (v1). Editorial style (v2) may appeal to brand-conscious visitors.
successMetric: Contact form submissions, time on page, scroll depth
notes: Variants stored in variants.json. HeroClient.vue handles rendering. Exposure logged to console + GA4 (if loaded).
